name: ask-tty
description: Universal stdin proxy for Claude Code — get passwords, confirmations, and interactive input via Telegram when the Bash tool can't handle stdin

metadata.description: Bridges the gap between Claude Code's non-interactive Bash tool and commands that require stdin input

plugins.name: ask-tty
plugins.description: Teaches Claude to use ask-tty for stdin input (sudo, ssh, y/N confirmations). Includes CLI script, self-hosted Telegram relay service, and always-on skill.
